features.title: Live session list
features.description: see all running Claude Code agents at a glance, grouped by status (waiting for approval → active → idle → ended)

features.title: Permission modals
features.description: review and approve/deny tool permission requests (Edit, Write, Bash) without leaving the terminal

features.title: Usage panel
features.description: today's cost, monthly spend, all-time totals, 7-day cost chart, token breakdown and model breakdown — all pulled from ccusage

features.title: Usage cache
features.description: usage data is persisted locally so it appears instantly on next launch

features.title: Animated indicators
features.description: braille spinner ⠋⠙⠹⠸⠼⠴⠦⠧ while agents are thinking, Nerd Font section icons

features.title: Session management
features.description: rename sessions, launch new Claude sessions (tmux window, iTerm2 tab, or Terminal.app), clear ended sessions

features.title: Auto-spawns daemon
features.description: claude-dash daemon starts automatically on first launch; no separate step needed

features.title: Mouse support
features.description: scroll the agent list with the mouse wheel

features.title: Pure Rust
features.description: single binary, no Node.js or npm required
